2606.25608.title: An Approach for a Supporting Multi-LLM System for Automated Certification Based on the German IT-Grundschutz
2606.25608.paper_summary: This paper presents a novel approach to perform semi-automated BSI IT-Grundschutz certification using a MultiLarge Language Model system (MLS) with Hybrid RetrievalAugmented Generation (HybridRAG). Facing the challenges of the Network and Information Security Directive 2 (NIS2) directive, a shortage of specialists, and high implementation costs, our MLS architecture aims to increase efficiency, reduce costs, and support certifiers in maintaining the quality of security concepts while meeting the increased demand for certifications of newly affected companies. The system combines Large Language Models (LLMs) and Knowledge Graphs (KGs) to support different phases of the certification process, including protection needs assessment, modeling, IT-Grundschutz check, measure consolidation, and subsequent realization. Our architecture addresses the growing demand for security concepts and offers an approach to handle the digital security challenges introduced by NIS2.
2606.25608.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文提出了一種新穎的方法，利用多大型語言模型系統（MLS）和混合檢索增強生成（HybridRAG）進行半自動化的BSI IT-Grundschutz認證。面對網絡和信息安全指令2（NIS2）帶來的挑戰、專家短缺以及高昂的實施成本，我們的MLS架構旨在提高效率、降低成本，並支持認證機構在滿足新受影響公司的認證需求的同時維持安全概念的質量。該系統結合了大型語言模型（LLMs）和知識圖譜（KGs），以支持認證過程的不同階段，包括保護需求評估、建模、IT-Grundschutz檢查、措施整合和隨後的實現。我們的架構應對了對安全概念日益增長的需求，並提供了一種應對NIS2所帶來的數字安全挑戰的方法。
2606.25608.author: Lea Roxanne Muth et.al.
